title: Mentorship (1:1)
tagline: A dedicated space to slow down, tune in, and be held — guided by the heart.
descriptionHeading: What is The Holy Motherhood Mentorship?
description1:
In a world where we are asked to embody the Divine Mother in our walk as mothers, we require to be held, nurtured and supported by systems that hold us.

At this time, as we well know, there is a need to weave threads of connection across the globe and create a new way - a system built on sustainability. 

The Mother must have safe spaces to retreat to. 
Spaces to pause, reflect, and receive reflection. 

The Holy Motherhood Mentorship was created to meet that need. As a mother for the past 8 years, I have experience the necessity of becoming what we seek.
description2:
I believe Motherhood is the most Holy honor and blessing of being a woman, and it is my honor to welcome all parts of you home. 

Here, we explore every facet of this path, and inquire within to find opportunities for ancestral healing and transformation. 

If you know that there are patterns in your lineage that need to end with you, and you know that you are here to embody the true essence of Mother as a Holy gift, then my mentorship work is for you.
whoIsThisFor: This mentorship is for women who are ready to trust themselves and take responsibility for their growth. Whether you’re navigating a loss of identity, moving through a major life transition, feeling stuck in old patterns, or simply curious to be held & witnessed in this new season of your life, this space is for you.

sessionDetails.label: 3-hour immersion
sessionDetails.value: Holy Motherhood Mentorship + Womb Therapy (inquire for pricing)
